steps.title: Identify the market leader and runner-up
steps.content: Tetris (puzzle) sold 43 million units—roughly five times more than Mario (platformer) at 7.46 million, and over 17 times more than Ice Hockey (sports). Puzzle is the clear market leader.

steps.title: Confirm the top two outsold the rest
steps.content: Puzzle plus platformer totals roughly 50 million units, vastly exceeding sports plus education's 6.4 million. A and B invent false parity between unrelated genres, while D incorrectly asserts the weakest pairing dominated. That matches choice C — C is correct.
